scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5000 && npm run start:electron"
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && cd electron && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5000 && npm run start:electron"
scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../electron && npm install
